mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE menu_record ( menu_seq, up_menu_seq, menu_nm, menu_type_cd, menu_view_path, menu_url, use_yn, sort_seq, level, menu_name_path, menu_id_path, sort_seq_path, path, cycle ) AS ( SELECT tm.menu_seq, tm.up_menu_seq, tm.menu_nm, tm.menu_type_cd, tm.menu_view_path, tm.menu_url, tm.use_yn, tm.sort_seq, 0, tm.menu_nm || '' AS menu_name_path, tm.menu_seq::text || '' AS menu_id_path, tm.menu_seq::text || '' AS sort_seq_path, ARRAY[tm.menu_seq], FALSE FROM tb_menu tm WHERE tm.up_menu_seq IS NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT tm.menu_seq, tm.up_menu_seq, tm.menu_nm, tm.menu_type_cd, tm.menu_view_path, tm.menu_url, tm.use_yn, tm.sort_seq, level + 1, mr.menu_name_path || ' > ' || tm.menu_nm, mr.menu_id_path || ' > ' || tm.menu_seq::text, mr.sort_seq_path || '-' || tm.sort_seq || '-' || tm.menu_seq::text, mr.path || tm.menu_seq, tm.menu_seq = ANY(path) FROM tb_menu tm INNER JOIN menu_record mr ON tm.up_menu_seq = mr.menu_seq WHERE 1=1 AND NOT CYCLE ) SELECT mr.menu_seq, mr.up_menu_seq AS up_menu_seq, mr.menu_nm, mr.menu_type_cd, mr.menu_view_path, mr.menu_url, mr.use_yn, mr.sort_seq, mr.menu_name_path, mr.menu_id_path, mr.sort_seq_path, mr.path, mr.level, tu.user_name AS rgst_user_name, tm.rgst_date_time::timestamp AS rgst_date_time, tu2.user_name AS upt_user_name, tm.upt_date_time::timestamp AS upt_date_time FROM menu_record mr LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_menu tm ON mr.menu_seq = tm.menu_seq LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_user tu ON tm.rgst_user_seq = tu.user_seq LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_user tu2 ON tm.upt_user_seq = tu2.user_seq ORDER BY mr.sort_seq_path

SELECT DISTINCT amb.menu_seq FROM tb_auth_menu_btn amb JOIN tb_auth_user au ON amb.auth_grp_seq = au.auth_grp_seq AND amb.auth_seq = au.auth_seq JOIN tb_user u ON au.user_seq = u.user_seq JOIN tb_menu_btn mb ON amb.menu_seq = mb.menu_seq AND amb.btn_seq = mb.btn_seq AND mb.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND au.use_yn = 'Y' AND amb.use_yn = 'Y' AND au.str_dt <= TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD') AND au.end_dt >= TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD')
